01646|   const monitorSwapStatus = async (requestId: string) => {
01647|     const maxAttempts = 60
01648|     let attempts = 0
01649|     let lastStatus = ''
01650| 
01651|     const checkStatus = async () => {
01652|       try {
01653|         const status = await relayAPI.getStatus(requestId)
01654|         
01655|         console.log(`Swap status check ${attempts + 1}/${maxAttempts}:`, {
01656|           status: status.status,
01657|           details: status.details,
01658|           inTxHashes: status.inTxHashes,
01659|           txHashes: status.txHashes,
01660|         })
01661| 
01662|         // Show status updates to user
01663|         if (status.status !== lastStatus) {
01664|           lastStatus = status.status
01665|           
01666|           if (status.status === 'waiting') {
01667|             toast.info('Waiting for transaction confirmation...')
01668|           } else if (status.status === 'pending') {
01669|             toast.info('Processing swap...')
01670|           } else if (status.status === 'submitted') {
01671|             toast.info('Swap submitted to destination chain...')
01672|           } else if (status.status === 'delayed') {
01673|             toast.warning('Swap is taking longer than expected...')
01674|           }
01675|         }
01676|         
01677|         if (status.status === 'success') {
01678|           toast.success('Swap completed successfully!')

01680|           updateUserStreak()
01681|           setFromAmount('')
01682|           setToAmount('')
01683|           setUsdAmount('')
01684|           
01685|           // Refetch balances to show updated amounts
01686|           refetchBalances()
01687|           
01688|           return
01689|         } else if (status.status === 'failure') {
01690|           toast.error(`Swap failed: ${status.details || 'Unknown error'}`)
01691|           console.error('Swap failure details:', status)
01692|           setIsSwapping(false)
01693|           return
01694|         } else if (status.status === 'refunded') {
01695|           toast.error(`Swap was refunded: ${status.details || 'Transaction could not be completed'}`)
01696|           console.error('Swap refund details:', status)
01697|           setIsSwapping(false)
01698|           return
01699|         }
01700|

01702|         if (attempts < maxAttempts) {
01703|           setTimeout(checkStatus, 2000)
01704|         } else {
